name: Stuart, Claire
evidence: Gave $1,000 to Travis County Commissioner Ann Howard (2021); prolific Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 25 donations). No zip, occupation, or employer in the filing, and 'Claire Stuart' is too common to tie to a specific person without corroborating detail. Not classified.

name: Gilliland, Douglas
resolved_employer: Managing Director, Taurus Investment Holdings; developer of the Whisper Valley master-planned community (geothermal 'geo-grid' homes) in NE Travis County
evidence: Douglas Gilliland is the Austin real-estate developer behind Whisper Valley, a master-planned community NE of Austin, and managing director of Taurus Investment Holdings. He gave to Commissioner Jeff Travillion, whose Precinct 1 contains Whisper Valley - a strong contextual match. (No zip in filing; identity rests on the developer/precinct alignment.)
